requirement_topic.en: EAEU TR CU 020/2011 EMC for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: EAEU TR CU 020/2011 电动汽车充电设备电磁兼容
requirement_topic.zht: EAEU TR CU 020/2011 電動汽車充電設備電磁相容

summary.en: EV chargers with power electronics, controls, communication modules, contactors, metering, and network interfaces can fall within TR CU 020/2011 electromagnetic compatibility review. The Kazakhstan route should confirm emissions, immunity, surge, conducted disturbance, radiated disturbance, harmonic, flicker, and installation assumptions for the final charger cabinet and cable set.
summary.zh: 带有电力电子、控制器、通信模块、接触器、计量和网络接口的电动汽车充电设备可能落入TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容审查范围。哈萨克斯坦路径应确认最终充电柜和线缆组合的发射、抗扰度、浪涌、传导骚扰、辐射骚扰、谐波、闪变和安装假设。
summary.zht: 帶有電力電子、控制器、通訊模組、接觸器、計量和網路介面的電動汽車充電設備可能落入TR CU 020/2011電磁相容審查範圍。哈薩克斯坦路徑應確認最終充電櫃和線纜組合的發射、抗擾度、浪湧、傳導騷擾、輻射騷擾、諧波、閃變和安裝假設。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 On electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices
Applicable GOST or ST RK EMC standards harmonized with IEC / CISPR references
EAEU conformity assessment and EAC marking rules

summary.en: China dossiers may include GB/T 18487.1-2023 EMC clauses, GB/T 17626 series immunity tests, GB/T 9254 / CISPR-type emission reports where used, and charger-level EMC reports. These should be checked against the EAEU route, accepted standards list, operating voltage, cable length, enclosure, and communication options.
summary.zh: 中国资料可能包括GB/T 18487.1-2023电磁兼容条款、GB/T 17626系列抗扰度测试、使用时的GB/T 9254或CISPR类发射报告以及整机EMC报告。应将其与EAEU路径、认可标准清单、工作电压、线缆长度、外壳和通信选项逐项核对。
summary.zht: 中國資料可能包括GB/T 18487.1-2023電磁相容條款、GB/T 17626系列抗擾度測試、使用時的GB/T 9254或CISPR類發射報告以及整機EMC報告。應將其與EAEU路徑、認可標準清單、工作電壓、線纜長度、外殼和通訊選項逐項核對。

gap.en: Map Chinese EMC reports to EAEU accepted clauses and retest if the final Kazakhstan SKU differs in cable harness, enclosure, power module, modem, payment terminal, RFID reader, or software-controlled operating mode.
gap.zh: 应将中国EMC报告映射至EAEU认可条款；若哈萨克斯坦最终SKU在线束、外壳、功率模块、调制解调器、支付终端、RFID读卡器或软件控制运行模式上不同，应补充测试。
gap.zht: 應將中國EMC報告映射至EAEU認可條款；若哈薩克斯坦最終SKU在線束、外殼、功率模組、數據機、支付終端、RFID讀卡器或軟體控制運行模式上不同，應補充測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger is within TR CU 020/2011 scope and is placed on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or procurement-specific depending on Chinese product category, CCC / CQC / GB scope, and project requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC reports from China are not automatically sufficient for Kazakhstan. Confirm the EAEU TR CU 020/2011 route and retest configuration-sensitive charger variants where needed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国EMC报告并不自动满足哈萨克斯坦要求。应确认EAEU TR CU 020/2011路径，并在需要时对配置敏感的充电设备变体补充测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國EMC報告並不自動滿足哈薩克斯坦要求。應確認EAEU TR CU 020/2011路徑，並在需要時對配置敏感的充電設備變體補充測試。
